top_signals.title: Few in U.S. say Iran war was worth it, poll finds
top_signals.summary: Only 23% of Americans think the U.S. is now in a stronger position with Iran compared with its position before the war, the poll found.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Rise After Chip-Fueled Global Selloff: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks in Asia rose in early trading after a global tech-led selloff on Tuesday that renewed concerns that the artificial intelligence-driven equity rally may have run too far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Feds seize alleged cyber-scam infrastructure connected to Southeast Asian company
top_signals.summary: The Department of Justice announced the “seizure of a cloud computing account” used by subsidiaries of the Huione Group, a conglomerate severed from the U.S. financial system last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Zcash miner Fortitude gets Nasdaq listing via HeartSciences merger
top_signals.summary: The all-stock deal gives Fortitude a Nasdaq listing while HeartSciences retains its healthcare business and existing shareholders keep a minority stake.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Anschuetz Adds Generic Overlay for SYNAPSIS ECDIS NX
top_signals.summary: Anschuetz has added the Generic Overlay feature, which extends SYNAPSIS (W)ECDIS NX by enabling the direct display of external, geo-referenced data within the chart. Third-party systems can provide their information as overlay layers, visualized…
